case_title: IVIS AMAL BITAR VS. GREGORY NOTO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-28-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF IVIS AMAL BITAR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GREGORY NOTO IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BITAR, IVIS AMAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NOTO, GREGORY $4,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,150.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
